## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences on what this PR changes and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would change existing behavior)
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup (no functional change)
- [ ] Build / CI / docs only

## Tested on

<!-- Check every browser you actually exercised PiP on while testing. -->

- [ ] Chrome
- [ ] Edge
- [ ] Brave
- [ ] Vivaldi
- [ ] Opera
- [ ] Firefox

## Checklist

- [ ] `./build.ps1 -BuildPortable` succeeds locally
- [ ] If a behavior changed, `CHANGELOG.md` has an entry under `[Unreleased]` or a new version section
- [ ] If `pip-controller.ahk` changed, the tray icon and the `^!p` suspend hotkey still work
- [ ] No new secrets, tokens, or absolute local paths committed
